mapper.select: WITH RECURSIVE DEPT_TREE AS ( SELECT DEPT_ID, UP_DEPT_ID FROM DEPARTMENT WHERE DEPT_ID = #{deptId} UNION ALL SELECT D.DEPT_ID, D.UP_DEPT_ID FROM DEPARTMENT D JOIN DEPT_TREE DT ON D.UP_DEPT_ID = DT.DEPT_ID ) SELECT COALESCE(TO_CHAR(T.WORK_YMD, 'YYYYMMDD'), #{workYmd}) AS WORK_YMD , U.USER_ID , U.USER_NM , U.JBGD_CD , T.WORK_BGNG_DT , T.WORK_END_DT , T.WORK_HR , T.LATE_YN , T.EARLY_YN , T.OVERTIME_YN , T.OVERTIME_HR , U.DEPT_ID , COALESCE(U.WORK_STTS_CD, 'C103') AS WORK_STTS_CD , CASE WHEN COALESCE(U.WORK_STTS_CD, 'C103') = 'C104' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS VACT_YN , CASE WHEN COALESCE(U.WORK_STTS_CD, 'C103') = 'C105' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS BZTR_YN FROM USERS U LEFT OUTER JOIN TIME_AND_ATTENDANCE T ON U.USER_ID = T.USER_ID AND TO_CHAR(T.WORK_YMD, 'YYYYMMDD') = #{workYmd} LEFT OUTER JOIN DEPT_TREE DT ON U.DEPT_ID = DT.DEPT_ID WHERE DT.DEPT_ID IS NOT NULL AND U.RSGNTN_YN = 'N' ORDER BY U.JBGD_CD , U.USER_ID

WITH RECURSIVE DEPT_TREE AS ( SELECT DEPT_ID, UP_DEPT_ID FROM DEPARTMENT WHERE DEPT_ID = #{deptId} UNION ALL SELECT D.DEPT_ID, D.UP_DEPT_ID FROM DEPARTMENT D JOIN DEPT_TREE DT ON D.UP_DEPT_ID = DT.DEPT_ID ) SELECT COALESCE(TO_CHAR(T.WORK_YMD, 'YYYYMMDD'), #{workYmd}) AS WORK_YMD , U.USER_ID , U.USER_NM , U.JBGD_CD , T.WORK_BGNG_DT , T.WORK_END_DT , T.WORK_HR , T.LATE_YN , T.EARLY_YN , T.OVERTIME_YN , T.OVERTIME_HR , U.DEPT_ID , COALESCE(U.WORK_STTS_CD, 'C103') AS WORK_STTS_CD , CASE WHEN COALESCE(U.WORK_STTS_CD, 'C103') = 'C104' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS VACT_YN , CASE WHEN COALESCE(U.WORK_STTS_CD, 'C103') = 'C105' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS BZTR_YN FROM USERS U LEFT OUTER JOIN TIME_AND_ATTENDANCE T ON U.USER_ID = T.USER_ID AND TO_CHAR(T.WORK_YMD, 'YYYYMMDD') = #{workYmd} LEFT OUTER JOIN DEPT_TREE DT ON U.DEPT_ID = DT.DEPT_ID WHERE DT.DEPT_ID IS NOT NULL AND U.RSGNTN_YN = 'N' ORDER BY U.JBGD_CD , U.USER_ID
